esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// sys_cpu_combined_percent_normalized is 0-1; alert when > 85%
// Adjust threshold (0.85) for your capacity planning
| WHERE metrics.sys_cpu_combined_percent_normalized IS NOT NULL
  AND metrics.sys_cpu_combined_percent_normalized > 0.85
| STATS cpu_pct = MAX(metrics.sys_cpu_combined_percent_normalized)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id
| SORT cpu_pct DESC
